_comment: Central config for The Interested Indian pipeline. Commit this file.

mascot.description: Chubby round Indian cartoon mascot, amber round glasses, spiky black hair, warm tan skin, cream kurta, off-white pajama trousers, sandals. 4 expressions: NEUTRAL, SHOCKED, CONFUSED, SMUG.

themes.auto: odd episodes = dark, even episodes = light
themes.dark: deep navy #0C1828 bg, white text, amber accent
themes.light: warm cream #FAF7F2 bg, dark brown text, crimson accent

pexels.note: Free API, no watermark, commercial use OK. Get key at pexels.com/api
